창세기 18:1.content: Yahweh appeared to him by the oaks of Mamre, as he sat in the tent door in the heat of the day.

창세기 18:2.content: He lifted up his eyes and looked, and saw that three men stood near him. When he saw them, he ran to meet them from the tent door, and bowed himself to the earth,

창세기 18:3.content: and said, “My lord, if now I have found favor in your sight, please don’t go away from your servant.

창세기 18:4.content: Now let a little water be fetched, wash your feet, and rest yourselves under the tree.

창세기 18:5.content: I will get a piece of bread so you can refresh your heart. After that you may go your way, now that you have come to your servant.” They said, “Very well, do as you have said.”

창세기 18:6.content: Abraham hurried into the tent to Sarah, and said, “Quickly prepare three seahs of fine meal, knead it, and make cakes.”

창세기 18:7.content: Abraham ran to the herd, and fetched a tender and good calf, and gave it to the servant. He hurried to dress it.

창세기 18:8.content: He took butter, milk, and the calf which he had dressed, and set it before them. He stood by them under the tree, and they ate.

창세기 18:9.content: They asked him, “Where is Sarah, your wife?” He said, “There, in the tent.”

창세기 18:10.content: He said, “I will certainly return to you at about this time next year; and behold, Sarah your wife will have a son.” Sarah heard in the tent door, which was behind him.

창세기 18:11.content: Now Abraham and Sarah were old, well advanced in age. Sarah had passed the age of childbearing.

창세기 18:12.content: Sarah laughed within herself, saying, “After I have grown old will I have pleasure, my lord being old also?”

창세기 18:13.content: Yahweh said to Abraham, “Why did Sarah laugh, saying, ‘Will I really bear a child when I am old?’

창세기 18:14.content: Is anything too hard for Yahweh? At the set time I will return to you, when the season comes round, and Sarah will have a son.”

창세기 18:15.content: Then Sarah denied it, saying, “I didn’t laugh,” for she was afraid. He said, “No, but you did laugh.”

창세기 18:16.content: The men rose up from there, and looked toward Sodom. Abraham went with them to see them on their way.

창세기 18:17.content: Yahweh said, “Will I hide from Abraham what I do,

창세기 18:18.content: since Abraham will surely become a great and mighty nation, and all the nations of the earth will be blessed in him?

창세기 18:19.content: For I have known him, to the end that he may command his children and his household after him, that they may keep the way of Yahweh, to do righteousness and justice; to the end that Yahweh may bring on Abraham that which he has spoken of him.”

창세기 18:20.content: Yahweh said, “Because the cry of Sodom and Gomorrah is great, and because their sin is very grievous,

창세기 18:21.content: I will go down now, and see whether their deeds are as bad as the reports which have come to me. If not, I will know.”

창세기 18:22.content: The men turned from there, and went toward Sodom, but Abraham stood yet before Yahweh.

창세기 18:23.content: Abraham came near, and said, “Will you consume the righteous with the wicked?

창세기 18:24.content: What if there are fifty righteous within the city? Will you consume and not spare the place for the fifty righteous who are in it?

창세기 18:25.content: May it be far from you to do things like that, to kill the righteous with the wicked, so that the righteous should be like the wicked. May that be far from you. Shouldn’t the Judge of all the earth do right?”

창세기 18:26.content: Yahweh said, “If I find in Sodom fifty righteous within the city, then I will spare the whole place for their sake.”

창세기 18:27.content: Abraham answered, “See now, I have taken it on myself to speak to the Lord, although I am dust and ashes.

창세기 18:28.content: What if there will lack five of the fifty righteous? Will you destroy all the city for lack of five?” He said, “I will not destroy it if I find forty-five there.”

창세기 18:29.content: He spoke to him yet again, and said, “What if there are forty found there?” He said, “I will not do it for the forty’s sake.”

창세기 18:30.content: He said, “Oh don’t let the Lord be angry, and I will speak. What if there are thirty found there?” He said, “I will not do it if I find thirty there.”

창세기 18:31.content: He said, “See now, I have taken it on myself to speak to the Lord. What if there are twenty found there?” He said, “I will not destroy it for the twenty’s sake.”

창세기 18:32.content: He said, “Oh don’t let the Lord be angry, and I will speak just once more. What if ten are found there?” He said, “I will not destroy it for the ten’s sake.”

창세기 18:33.content: Yahweh went his way, as soon as he had finished communing with Abraham, and Abraham returned to his place.
